description: An agent must create an organization chart based on a list of project roles and their reporting structure.

nodes.task_description: Receive a list of roles and who they report to (e.g., 'Analyst A reports to Manager B').

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully ingests the hierarchical data.

nodes.task_description: Generate a visual organization chart (e.g., using Mermaid syntax) that accurately reflects the reporting structure.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a valid and correct organizational chart diagram.
